message:
Implement P3.5: Conversation Viewer and app module

- Add conversation.js for message display
  - Markdown rendering with fallback parser
  - DOMPurify-based XSS sanitization
  - Syntax highlighting support via Prism.js
  - Message highlighting and scroll-to
  - Copy conversation to clipboard
  - Back navigation with Escape key

- Add viewer.js main application module
  - View state management (search/conversation)
  - Statistics display (conversations, messages, agents)
  - Deep linking via URL params (?conv=123&msg=456)
  - Browser history navigation support
  - Resource cleanup on exit

Part of Phase 3: Web Viewer (coding_agent_session_search-uok7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
